source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 习近平瞩望的“人民城市”
topics.why_hot: President Xi's concept of people-centered urban development resonates widely, reflecting public expectations for better city governance.
topics.share_angle: Explain the 'People's City' concept and its implications for urban planning and residents' quality of life.

topics.chinese_topic: 巨浪击沉游轮游客漂流5小时 有人吓吐

topics.why_hot: Dramatic maritime accident with survival story captures public attention and raises safety concerns.
topics.share_angle: Discuss cruise safety measures and survival tips in emergencies.

topics.chinese_topic: 未来五年坐火车有这些变化

topics.why_hot: Railway development plans directly affect millions of travelers, sparking interest in future improvements.
topics.share_angle: Highlight key upgrades: speed, comfort, coverage, and ticketing reforms.

topics.chinese_topic: “中药首富”马兴田夫妇被判赔14亿

topics.why_hot: High-profile legal case involving a former billionaire and traditional medicine industry raises discussions on corporate accountability.
topics.share_angle: Analyze the implications for the TCM industry and investor protection.

topics.chinese_topic: 这些充电习惯正悄悄缩短手机寿命

topics.why_hot: Practical tech tip that resonates with smartphone users seeking to extend device longevity.
topics.share_angle: List common mistakes and best practices for battery care.

topics.chinese_topic: 全国最后一位长征女红军王全英逝世
topics.official_english: Last Female Red Army Veteran of the Long March, Wang Quanying, Passes Away
topics.why_hot: Historical figure's passing marks the end of an era, evoking national remembrance and respect.
topics.share_angle: Honor her legacy and the history of the Long March.

topics.chinese_topic: “按骑手学历收配送费”系谣言

topics.why_hot: Misinformation about delivery fees caused public concern; clarification restores trust.

topics.chinese_topic: “非洲手机之王”涨价 销量下滑
